TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: I 1948 a miheca saka folad saka a romi'ad masofoc ci Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no United arab emirates anini i ci Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2004 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 3 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i kńßa…ĺifa b~b~vin *aj…ô…¨~…ģ a…ĺ nańßjan , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ arab~b~v …ômirat…ôs anini i ¶i kńßa…ĺifa b~b~vin *aj…ô…¨~…ģ a…ĺ nańßjan, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1948 a miheca saka folad saka a romi'ad masofoc ci Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no United arab emirates anini i ci Khalifa bin Zayed Al Nahyan, patirengan a romi'ad i 2004 a miheca saka 11 folad saka 3 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i kńßa…ĺifa b~b~vin *aj…ô…¨~…ģ a…ĺ nańßjan , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u o~u~unit…ô…¨~…ģ arab~b~v …ômirat…ôs anini i ¶i kńßa…ĺifa b~b~vin *aj…ô…¨~…ģ a…ĺ nańßjan, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka * a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
